coverage_note: Total Australian coal production: 420,000 kt (Geoscience Australia 2023-24). Includes export coal (~330,000 kt, 79%) and domestic coal (~90,000 kt, 21%). Per-kt energy and emissions coefficients are national averages from AES/NGGI and therefore apply directly to the total production basis.
notes: Calibrated to AES 2023-24 Table F and NGGI 2023-24 Cat 1B1a. Energy at anchor: 420,000 kt × 406 GJ/kt = 170.5 PJ (AES reference: 174.0 PJ, coverage = 98.0%). Fugitive at anchor: 420,000 kt × 69 tCO2e/kt = 29.0 MtCO2e (NGGI Cat 1B1a = 29 MtCO2e, coverage = 99.9%). Demand trajectory: declining__coal_mining_total (−1.1%/yr compound, weighted average of export −0.75%/yr and domestic −2.5%/yr).
